questions.question: As announced on 30 April 2025, what major decision did the Indian Cabinet take regarding the upcoming decennial census?
questions.option_2: To conduct the first ever digital-only census
questions.option_3: To include a caste-based enumeration in the next census

questions.question: Which State government launched a cryogenic facility to preserve endangered plant species in February 2025?
Which Indian institute was officially notified as an 'Institution Deemed to be University' by the Union Ministry of Education?
questions.option_1: Film and Television Institute of India (FTII), Pune
questions.option_3: K R Narayanan National Institute of Visual Science and Arts, Kerala
questions.option_4: Indian Institute of Mass Communication (IIMC), New Delhi

questions.question: Which Indian non‑profit, profiled by IEEE Spectrum (December 2024), built AI models to predict adverse TB outcomes?
Researchers from which Indian institute developed an advanced agricultural robot designed to detect plant diseases and apply pesticides precisely?
In which of the following institutes was ‘Shri S. Ramakrishnan Centre of Excellence in Fluid and Thermal Science Research’ launched in March 2025?
Which of the following Defence Public Sector Undertakings (DPSUs) were granted 'Miniratna' Category-I status by Defence Minister Rajnath Singh in May 2025?
President Droupadi Murmu conferred how many Kirti Chakras, including four posthumous, during Phase-I of the Defence Investiture Ceremony 2025 in May 2025?
Who is the director of the Indian entry at the 78ᵗʰ Cannes Film Festival named ‘Homebound’, starring Janhvi Kapoor, Ishaan Khatter and Vishal Jethwa?
In 2025, the Central government selected which of the following start-ups to build India’s first indigenous artificial intelligence (AI) large language model (LLM)?
Tuhin Kanta Pandey succeeded whom as the chairman of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) in March 2025?
Which novel earned Percival Everett the Pulitzer Prize for Fiction in 2025?
Which of the following Indian space missions captured its first image of a solar flare in February 2025?
According to an official report released in April 2025, AI-based real-time forest monitoring system has been implemented for the first time in which state sensitive forest divisions?
As of June 2025, how many languages are listed in the Eighth Schedule of the Indian Constitution?
Which two places are in the news due to the approval of Greenfield airports for better connectivity by the Central Government on 5 May 2025?
Which of the following is the first African country to sign the International Solar Alliance (ISA) in April 2025?
Who became the Chief Minister of Delhi after the February 2025 Legislative Assembly elections?
Who was elected as the President of Lebanon in January 2025, ending a two-year vacancy?
In May 2024, the World Health Organization (WHO) prequalified the QDENGA vaccine developed by Takeda Pharmaceuticals. This vaccine is designed to protect against which disease?
Which of the following organisations unveiled the country's first five Carbon Capture and Utilisation (CCU) testbeds in the cement sector in May 2025?
questions.option_2: Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India
questions.option_3: Union Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)

questions.question: The Indian Army celebrated its 77ᵗʰ Army Day at Pune on which date, which marked the third occasion that the Army Day Parade was held outside Delhi?
In February 2025, which Indian agency launched a ₹500-crore Technology Adoption Fund to support early-stage space startups and reduce import dependency?
Where was the 12ᵗʰ International Tourism Mart (ITM) held in November 2024 to promote Northeast India's tourism potential?
Which of the following cities hosted the 2025 Conferences of the Parties for the Basel, Rotterdam and Stockholm Conventions (BRS COPs)?
